positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical illustration of a cosmic forest scene. The central subject is a bioluminescent grouping of crystalline mushrooms and towering, ancient trees with root structures mimicking constellations. Incorporate celestial elements like crescent moons, shooting stars, and delicate nebula swirls that connect the flora. The overall style must be clean, sophisticated, and modern, combining elements of Art Nouveau etching with deep space aesthetic. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette: deep indigo, emerald green, vibrant magenta, and luminous gold accents against a midnight blue background. Focus on clean silhouettes, strong lines, and intricate detailing suitable for screen printing. Central composition, flat lay, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, low contrast, grainy, photographic, messy, grunge, watermark, text, signature, logo, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, mutated, noise, out of focus, jpeg compression
